question: What are the two core elements that power a Zephyrian 'Storm-Engine'?

answers.ground_truth: A Zephyrian 'Storm-Engine' is powered by 'Lightning Essence' and 'Thunder-Stone'.
answers.original: The two core elements that power a Zephyrian Storm-Engine are Lightning Essence and Thunder-Stone.
answers.perturbed: A Zephyrian Storm-Engine harnesses the raw power of Lightning Essence captured during atmospheric tempests.

ops.description: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is woven with Moon-Silk.
River barges are a primary mode of trade transportation within Eldoria.<SEP>Trade within Eldoria relies heavily on river barges.
Whirlwind-Crystal hums with kinetic energy, contributing to the perpetual spinning motion of Spiral-Blades.

entities.name: Zephyrian Storm-Engine
entities.description: A Zephyrian Storm-Engine harnesses the raw power of Lightning Essence captured during atmospheric tempests.

entities.name: Lightning Essence
entities.description: Lightning Essence is a form of energy captured during atmospheric tempests and used in Storm-Engines.

entities.name: Zephyrian Architecture
entities.description: Zephyrian architecture often incorporates natural wind channels.

entities.name: Atmospheric Storms
entities.description: Atmospheric storms on Xylos are exceptionally powerful and are converted into electrical power by the Stellar Converter.<SEP>Atmospheric storms on Xylos are exceptionally powerful and are converted into electrical power by the Stellar Converter.

entities.name: Stellar Converter
entities.description: The Stellar Converter is a massive energy generation facility designed to convert atmospheric storms into electrical power.<SEP>The Stellar Converter is a massive energy generation facility designed to capture and convert atmospheric storms into electrical power.

relations.description: The Zephyrian Storm-Engine harnesses Lightning Essence to amplify and stabilize energy output.
The Stellar Converter captures and converts atmospheric storms into electrical power.<SEP>The Stellar Converter captures and converts atmospheric storms into electrical power.
Zephyrian architecture incorporates natural wind channels.
Thunder-Stone is used to channel and stabilize the Lightning Essence in the Storm-Engine.

entities.description: Prismarian apprentices learn color theory before forging.

entities.name: Floopy Rays
entities.description: Floopy rays are a type of radiation or energy that shield generators protect against.

entities.name: Critical Reviews
entities.description: Critical reviews in the Crystalline Sound Weaving scene focus on the intricacy of sonic patterns and harmonic structure.

entities.name: Blimpton
entities.description: Blimpton is a planet with a population of approximately 3.2 billion, a binary star system, and unique cultural and physical characteristics.
